/usr/bin/c++ CMakeFiles/final_result.dir/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/final_result.dir/src/manager.cpp.o CMakeFiles/final_result.dir/src/server.cpp.o CMakeFiles/final_result.dir/src/owner.cpp.o CMakeFiles/final_result.dir/src/grid_map.cpp.o CMakeFiles/final_result.dir/src/lastar.cpp.o CMakeFiles/final_result.dir/src/minisnap.cpp.o -o final_result  -Wl,-rpath,/usr/local/lib /usr/local/lib/libopencv_gapi.so.4.7.0 /usr/local/lib/libopencv_highgui.so.4.7.0 /usr/local/lib/libopencv_ml.so.4.7.0 /usr/local/lib/libopencv_objdetect.so.4.7.0 /usr/local/lib/libopencv_photo.so.4.7.0 /usr/local/lib/libopencv_stitching.so.4.7.0 /usr/local/lib/libopencv_video.so.4.7.0 /usr/local/lib/libopencv_videoio.so.4.7.0 /usr/local/lib/libOsqpEigen.so.0.11.0 /usr/local/lib/libopencv_imgcodecs.so.4.7.0 /usr/local/lib/libopencv_dnn.so.4.7.0 /usr/local/lib/libopencv_calib3d.so.4.7.0 /usr/local/lib/libopencv_features2d.so.4.7.0 /usr/local/lib/libopencv_flann.so.4.7.0 /usr/local/lib/libopencv_imgproc.so.4.7.0 /usr/local/lib/libopencv_core.so.4.7.0 /usr/local/lib/libosqp.so
